steps.title: Identify the Primary Goal
steps.content: The student must describe Untitled (Topographic Landscape) to a new audience—meaning the answer should focus on details about what the artwork actually is, not on Maya Lin's career or how it relates to her other works.

steps.title: Apply to the Choices
steps.content:
Choice D provides exactly what's needed: the date (1997), identification as a large-scale installation artwork, material (wood), and spatial impact (fills an entire gallery room)—the specific details that help a new audience visualize the work.

The other three choices either divert attention to the Vietnam Veterans Memorial, use Untitled as merely an example of Lin's career, or offer only vague description of the target artwork.

This matches choice D — D is correct.
